CVE-2008-7185.title: GNOME Rhythmbox 0.11.5 allows remote attackers to cause a denial  ...
CVE-2008-7185.description: GNOME Rhythmbox 0.11.5 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (segmentation fault and crash) via a playlist (.pls) file with a long Title field, possibly related to the g_hash_table_lookup function in b-playlist-manager.c.
